heroTitle: Smart energy for reliable, sustainable results.
heroSubtitle: We deliver energy solutions from design and installation to maintenance to simplify operations and ensure long-term quality.
engServicesDesc: From concept to execution — tailored studies, modeling, and integrated designs that ensure efficiency.
powerDesc: Smart diesel, hybrid, and renewable power systems delivering reliable energy for every sector.
operationDesc: Long-term O&M, preventive maintenance, and SLA contracts ensuring system reliability and continuity.
ctaSubtitle: Let’s design and deliver a reliable, sustainable solution.
aboutContent: SyneriQ Energy & Engineering Solutions is a Saudi-based engineering company specializing in power solutions and critical infrastructure support. The name SyneriQ reflects our core philosophy: Synergy of Energy, combined with 'Q' for IQ and engineering intelligence.
aboutContent2: We are not merely a maintenance provider; we are specialized engineers combining deep technical expertise with real field experience. We deliver end-to-end services from engineering design and generator supply to installation, commissioning, and long-term operation.
aboutContent3: Our strength lies in providing reliable, efficient, and future-ready solutions tailored for industrial, construction, and mission-critical applications across Saudi Arabia.
aboutContent4: We deploy smart, sustainable power systems aligned with Vision 2030, ensuring operational continuity for our clients.
aboutCompanyDescription: We are committed to delivering excellence in every project, combining innovation with reliability to exceed our clients' expectations.
contactSubtitle: At SyneriQ, we are always ready to support your vision — whether it’s an inquiry, a consultation, or a large-scale project. Let’s shape reliable and sustainable solutions together.
formSuccess: Thanks! We’ll get back to you shortly.
engineeringDesign_intro: End-to-end electrical, mechanical, civil, and architectural design for power systems.
teamTitle1: Behind SyneriQ is a strong team of engineers and professionals bringing decades of combined expertise
meetOurTeam: Our team combines electrical, mechanical, civil, and architectural disciplines, supported by AutoCAD & BIM specialists and skilled technicians for installation and maintenance. Together, we deliver innovative, reliable, and future-ready energy and engineering solutions.
readyToWorkDescription: Let's discuss how we can help bring your vision to life with our expertise and dedication.

footer.description: Leading provider of innovative energy and engineering solutions, committed to delivering sustainable and reliable services across the energy sector.

heroTitle: Engineering Energy for a Sustainable Future
heroSubtitle: Smart & reliable power & engineering solutions integrating local expertise with global standards .
whyChooseTitle: Why SyneriQ? Trusted Energy & Engineering Partner
whyChooseSubtitle: Driven by Innovation, Backed by Reliability
servicesSubtitle: At SyneriQ, our core services are built on five pillars that combine innovation, reliability, and sustainability — delivering complete energy and engineering solutions from start to finish.
powerDesc: Smart diesel, hybrid, and renewable power systems delivering reliable energy for every sector.

ctaSubtitle: Contact us today and let's discuss how we can help you achieve your energy goals.
engineeringDesignHeroTitle: Comprehensive engineering design services — electrical, mechanical, civil, and architectural.
engineeringDesignHeroSub: From concept to execution drawings, we deliver reliable, code-compliant, and build-ready designs.
ed_callout_title: Shaping solutions today to power tomorrow
ed_callout_sub: Saudi expertise blended with international standards — reliable, efficient, and build-ready.
ed_point1: Our engineering team is the heart of SyneriQ, with more than 15 specialized engineers covering electrical, mechanical, civil, and architectural disciplines.
ed_point2: We provide integrated design solutions: technical studies, AutoCAD drawings, BIM modeling, and complete handover packages.
ed_point3: With Saudi compliance and alignment to Vision 2030, our designs meet local regulations while adopting the highest global standards.
ed_point4: Backed by 20+ years of trusted expertise, we deliver innovative and sustainable engineering solutions tailored to client needs.
ed_point5: We see ourselves not only as designers, but as strategic partners,supporting clients at every step with reliability and efficiency.
ed_scope_sub: Full-stack design from concept to IFC drawings, with practical constructability in mind.
ed_scope1: Comprehensive engineering covering electrical, mechanical, civil, and architectural disciplines.
ed_scope2: Detailed 2D/3D drawings and BIM models, ensuring precision and smooth project handover.
ed_scope3: Practical and optimized solutions, balancing cost, performance, and constructability.
ed_scope4: Smart engineering optimizing resources, reducing costs, and maximizing project value.
ed_process_title: Design process that fits your timelines
ed_process_p1: We collaborate seamlessly with clients and authorities, delivering build-ready design packages that reduce rework and accelerate approvals.
ed_process_p2: Our expertise is tailored to the Saudi market while adopting global standards, ensuring precision, reliability, and timely delivery.
ed_quote_title: Engineering today’s vision into tomorrow’s reality.
ed_quote_sub: Let us transform your concepts into reliable, compliant, and future-ready solutions.
ed_deliver_desc: Full-stack design from concept to IFC drawings, with practical constructability in mind.
ed_process_title: Design process that fits your timelines
ed_process_desc: We collaborate remotely, align with authority requirements, and deliver build-ready design packages.
